summary: W877 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while using the W733 concrete-leaves-to-W732 route-data constructor to feed the W875 W732 selected-cochain stable ExactAt route. Product success remains false because concrete values for the eight W733 leaf providers, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W877 moves the latest stable ExactAt boundary to eight W733 concrete leaf providers, but concrete values for those providers are still not instantiated.

The W733 concrete-leaf surface still carries WPP boundary data, closed natural-transformation relation data, target surjectivity and compactness, selected-difference and mapped-cokernel closedness, normalized fixed-target data, source triangulation data, endpoint strict-topology data, and localized-right-adjoint data.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for the eight W733 concrete leaf providers.
Connect the resulting route to a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
